{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301350385E17C24F66C0C541869"}"},"total":27},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7544522032632202046","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"传统玄幻，轻松，慢节奏，毕竟是长篇。
此书有轰轰烈烈，也有，搞笑、煽情，前期主角几乎无敌，后期那更是战力滔天。
这本书在诸位看过之后，不会太过惊艳，但也不会让诸位太过失望。
前半部分多为稳中发育，渐渐地发展势力。
到了后半步部分，精彩紧凑的剧情会逐渐显现，你们想要的，书中全都有。
请诸君慢慢品尝。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756602346,"group_id":"7524922803213044761","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3488070246600237"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7524922803213044761","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1090"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":487219,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7528052510890296126","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"爽点多，够深度！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752765753,"group_id":"7524922803213044761","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"请多多关照，多多支持！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N61c+ok3TRJV5Io4wUxU2VeaVulSbbohJsX32MdRSOOY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/217747067f76493a883f15ee08f6c6e3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788631&x-signature=E1S33O2yYCdZuZfAdgyXgWLFbjc%3D","user_id":"3488070246600237","user_name":"骑马跑的快"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3488070246600237","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7524922803213044761","book_info":{"abstract":"从混沌中走出来的先天混沌魔神，并且他还是个修道的！
洪元世界，天道崩碎，有至强者不受约束，窃取天道，自称为天！
他们制定世间强权，规则由他们制定！上古时代，五天治世，相互攻伐，相互吞并，都要做那唯一的天！
如有，有那不遵守规则之人，则被他们视为逆天之人！共诛之！
来自华夏的古道涵，在混沌中塑身，铸就混沌魔神之躯，得混沌至宝混沌珠，脚踏先天灵宝十二品造化青莲，修混沌法则，降临异世，镇压五天！
建天庭、立地府，重开天道，定天地秩序！

洪元世界有那儒家门生“裴淮安”，他弃儒修道，以手中笔换掌心雷！
他想要修的那术法三千，来涤荡世间这万千的魑魅魍魉！”
古道涵看着他缓缓说道： “贫道有一雷法，可诛魑魅魍魉！你，
